title: STATUS Portland | 1.7 Litre Swivel Cordless Kettle | Glass | 2kw Fast Boiling Kettle
features: ELEGANT GLASS SWIVEL CORDLESS KETTLE STATUS presents a sleek 1.7 litre glass kettle with a cordless, 360° swivel base—perfect for stylish, functional counter use in modern kitchens.
FAST BOIL 2 kW PERFORMANCE Delivers efficient rapid boil capability, providing hot water quickly and quietly for everyday drinks and recipes.
DUAL WATER LEVEL INDICATORS Clear water windows on both sides allow precise measurement when filling, reducing spills and improving safety.
SAFETY CUT‑OUT WITH POWER INDICATOR Features boil-dry protection to prevent overheating and a visible power-on indicator to confirm the kettle is active.
REMOVABLE FILTER FOR CLEAN POURING Equipped with a detachable spout filter to block limescale, ensuring cleaner water and easy maintenance.
description: Portland - Glass - 1.7 Litre - Swivel Cordless - Kettle - 2kw - Status - 1 pk - in Glossy Retail Box
